meta.title: hypo.online — mortgage orientation in the Czech Republic
meta.description: Short check, AI-style approval probability, and optional broker contact. Not a bank decision.

home.badge: Mortgages in the Czech Republic — expat-friendly
home.headline: In a few minutes: an indicative approval probability and the right next step.
home.sub: This is not a bank approval. An automated model estimates a probability; a licensed mortgage broker can still help even when the signal is yellow or red.
home.trust1: Questionnaire answers are used only to compute your result and are not stored afterwards.
home.trust2: If you request contact, we keep only name, email and phone for broker handoff.
home.trust3: Built for phones first — Czech banks, foreign income, and Prague-focused reality.
home.howIntro: hypo.online helps people living in Czechia understand whether it is realistic to pursue a mortgage now — especially foreigners, mixed couples, and self-employed applicants. The flow is short on purpose: enough signal for brokers, not a 40-field bank form.
home.how_step1_title: 1) You answer a few focused questions
home.how_step1_body: Typical topics: what you are solving (purchase vs refinance), how your income is structured (employment in CZ, self-employed, foreign employer), and rough timing. Everything is mobile-friendly with one decision per screen.
home.how_step2_title: 2) An AI-style model estimates an approval probability
home.how_step2_body: Our backend runs an automated scoring model (machine-learnable rules today; you can swap in a hosted LLM later). It outputs a percentage that represents indicative bank-friendliness — not a promise. The final decision is always with the bank after full documentation.
home.how_step3_title: 3) You see a semaphore: green, yellow, or red
home.how_step3_body: Green suggests a relatively smoother path on average. Yellow and red often mean more documentation, residency, or income-proof complexity — but they are not “stop” signals. Many good files start yellow and finish green after broker structuring.
home.how_step4_title: 4) Yellow and red leads are still processed
home.how_step4_body: We intentionally keep the contact form for every colour. Brokers frequently earn their fee on non-obvious cases. If you want human help, you can always leave your details — the broker team triages urgency and next documents.
home.how_step5_body: If you submit your name, email and phone, we route the lead to partner mortgage brokers in Czechia. They contact you about realistic banks, rates, and paperwork — in line with your language where possible.
home.how_step6_body: We do not pretend to be a bank, we do not store your questionnaire payload after scoring, and we do not replace regulated advice. Use the output as orientation, then let a professional review your actual documents.
home.how_lead_note: AI probability + semaphore are marketing-grade summaries. Brokers may decline a lead after KYC — that is normal in lending.

quiz.intent: What are you mainly looking for?
quiz.timeline: When do you roughly expect to draw the loan?
quiz.aiNotice: This percentage is generated by an automated AI-style scoring model using your answers. It is not a bank decision and can be wrong for your specific documents.
quiz.resultIntro: Our model estimates an indicative approval probability of {percent}%.
quiz.hint_green: On average, similar profiles often proceed with a broker conversation and bank pre-checks without unusual blockers.
quiz.hint_yellow: Similar profiles often need extra documentation or a specialist path — still very workable with a broker.
quiz.hint_red: Similar profiles can be challenging for standard bank scoring — brokers may suggest alternative structures, timing, or lenders. Still worth a call if you are serious.
quiz.allSignalsLead: Yellow and red are not dead ends — submit your contact if you want a human review.
quiz.result_contactTitle: Want a broker to contact you?
quiz.result_contactHint: We only save the fields below — not your questionnaire answers.
quiz.name: Name
quiz.thankyou: Thank you — a broker will reach out.
quiz.disclaimer: Not a loan offer. Banks decide after full underwriting. The model output is probabilistic and may change as rules change.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.p1: We process only what the service needs. Answers from the quick check are used only to compute your result (including the AI-style probability) and are not stored afterwards.
privacy.p2: If you submit contact details, they are used so a selected mortgage broker can reach you. Add full legal text with your counsel.
